notes: Host-side Kafka producer path to 127.0.0.1:9094 is working: topic offsets increase after produce.
The original group coordinator failure was traced to missing __consumer_offsets and missing single-node consumer-group settings in Kafka.
Kafka compose and topic bootstrap have been updated so __consumer_offsets exists with replication-factor 1.
Broker logs now show consumer groups can join and receive assignments.
Host-run HTTP full-path proof now reaches telemetry.raw.v1, ClickHouse, and PostgreSQL device_state.
A minimal generic loopback consumer receipt proof still remains noisy, but it no longer blocks current rehearsal hardening.

producerOnlyProof.detail: A host-side producer send advanced telemetry.raw.v1 offsets.

consumerLoopbackProof.detail: After the Kafka repair, broker logs show group join/assignment for host loopback consumers, but a clean receipt proof has not yet been captured within the current script window.
consumerLoopbackProof.warning: Host-side kafkajs runs still exhibit TimeoutNegativeWarning noise.

consumerCoordinatorFix.detail: Kafka broker now has __consumer_offsets and single-node consumer-group settings; broker logs show group coordinator elections and assignments.

httpFullPathProof.detail: HTTP adapter publish succeeded, Kafka offsets advanced, telemetry-writer consumed, ClickHouse rows were written, and PostgreSQL device_state shadow was updated once the device was pre-created.

nextAction: Use the repaired Kafka broker settings as the new baseline and move on to higher-level semantic proofs rather than generic host consumer loopback diagnostics.
